case_title: CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION VS. CHRISTOPHER S. EASON

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-05-2004 Continued To May-10-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-10-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Prove-Up Hearing.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lavon Granger.
Francisco Torres, Esq., for Plaintiff: Caritas Management Corp.
No appearance by the Defendant: Christopher Eason.
09:45 am. - Plaintiff's witness: Fred Doughty was sworn and direct examined by counsel.
PLTF EXH #1 - Assisted lease agreement---------- ID/EVID.
PLTF EXH #2 - Three day notice to pay or quit--- ID/EVID.
PLTF EXH #3 - Three day notice to rent board---- ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for restitution and possession of the premises at: 422 Valencia St., #412, San Francisco.
Rent and Per Diem Damages of $33.20
No attorney's fees.
Costs of $213.30
Rental agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibits.
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-10-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-05-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Francisco Torres, Esq. for Plaintiff
Fred Doughty, Property Manager for Plaintiff Caritas Management

Settlement Conference off calendar. No appearance by defendant, Christopher s. Eason. Jury demand stricken. Court trial remains in Dept. #206 on May 10, 2004, 9 am. document.

Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: Marjorie Schwartz-Scott, No reporter
